Footer.tagline: Trust-scored deal intelligence for digital gift cards, credits, and vouchers.
Footer.copyright: Deal discovery and verification platform. We do not sell gift cards, hold funds, or process payments.
Footer.priceDisclaimer: Prices sourced from third-party sellers and may change.

Home.subheadline: We compute the real effective price on gift cards, credits, and vouchers — factoring in fees, region locks, and seller trust — so you never overpay.
Home.howItWorksSub: We go beyond listing prices. Every deal is computed, verified, and scored across four dimensions.
Home.featureEffectivePriceBody: Fees, membership costs, payment surcharges, denomination constraints — all factored in. Not just the sticker price.
Home.featurePriceHistoryBody: Every deal scored against its own history. Know if today's price is actually good or just normal.
Home.featureRegionFitBody: Region locks and account restrictions can make a cheap card useless. We check before you buy.
Home.featureTrustScoreBody: Sources classified Green, Yellow, or Red. Authorization, buyer protection, and fraud signals — all visible.
Home.topPicksSub: Ranked by deal quality and confidence. Updated continuously.
Home.categoriesSub: Find verified deals across all major digital value categories.
Home.promiseSub: Gift card markets are noisy. Discounts aren't always real. Region restrictions can make a deal worthless. We built iGift to be the verification layer the market is missing.
Home.promiseBullet1: Two-score system: Deal Quality + Confidence, shown separately
Home.promiseBullet2: Green / Yellow / Red trust zones on every source
Home.promiseBullet3: Effective price includes all fees, not just listing price
Home.promiseBullet4: Region and account compatibility checked before ranking
Home.promiseBullet5: Open methodology — we explain every score
Home.promiseBullet6: We never hold funds, sell cards, or process payments

SourcesPage.label: Source Directory
SourcesPage.heading: Where We Find Your Deals
SourcesPage.description: Every source iGift monitors, ranked by trust score. We evaluate buyer protection, refund policies, and live data quality so you know exactly where a deal comes from.
SourcesPage.noSourcesHint: The database has not been seeded yet.
SourcesPage.trustMethodologyBody: Each source is scored 0–100 across four dimensions: trust zone (40 pts), buyer protection availability (20 pts), refund policy presence (15 pts), and live fetch success rate (25 pts). Green Zone sources are official issuers or authorized resellers. Yellow Zone sources are reputable marketplaces where individual seller quality varies.

SourceDetail.scoreBreakdownSub: How the trust score is calculated
SourceDetail.allTimeLows: {count, plural, one {# all-time low} other {# all-time lows}} currently active
SourceDetail.buyerProtectionYes: Dispute resolution and purchase guarantees available
SourceDetail.buyerProtectionNo: No platform-level buyer protection — check seller reputation
SourceDetail.refundPolicyYes: Formal refund policy exists for eligible orders
SourceDetail.refundPolicyNo: No documented refund policy — all sales final
SourceDetail.staleWarning: Data may be stale — last fetch exceeded SLA by 50%
SourceDetail.activeOffersTracked: {count, plural, one {# active offer} other {# active offers}} currently tracked
SourceDetail.zoneGreenDesc: Official issuer or fully authorized reseller
SourceDetail.zoneYellowDesc: Reputable marketplace — individual seller quality varies

AboutPage.label: About
AboutPage.heading: About iGift
AboutPage.introParagraph1: iGift is a deal intelligence platform built to solve a clear problem: gift cards, prepaid credits, vouchers, and similar digital value products are sold across many websites, but buyers have no reliable way to know which offers are truly good, usable, and safe.
AboutPage.introParagraph2: Every deal on iGift is scored using our dual-score system: a <dealQuality>Deal Quality Score</dealQuality> that measures how good the deal actually is (including all fees, region fit, and historical context), and a <confidence>Confidence Score</confidence> that measures how much we trust our own data about it. Both scores are shown separately — because a great-looking deal with low confidence is not a deal you should trust.
AboutPage.weAre1: A deal intelligence and comparison engine
AboutPage.weAre4: Publisher/referral model with clear affiliate disclosure
AboutPage.weAreNot1: A marketplace — we never sell gift cards
AboutPage.weAreNot2: A payment processor — we never hold funds
AboutPage.weAreNot3: A code vault — we never store gift card codes
AboutPage.weAreNot4: An account reseller — credential listings are excluded
AboutPage.weAreNot5: A scraper — we only use public data and partner feeds
AboutPage.contactBody: For business inquiries, source partnerships, or corrections, reach us at

MethodologyPage.label: Methodology
MethodologyPage.heading: How We Score Deals
MethodologyPage.description: iGift uses a transparent, two-score verification system. We don't just show discounts — we verify them against reference prices, check region compatibility, account for fees, and assess source trustworthiness.
MethodologyPage.dealQualityDesc: Measures how good the deal actually is, considering all costs and context.
MethodologyPage.confidenceDesc: Measures how much we trust our own data about this deal. A high deal score with low confidence means "looks great but we're not sure."
MethodologyPage.trustZonesDesc: Every source is classified into a trust zone based on authorization, buyer protection, and fraud signals.
MethodologyPage.greenBody: Authorized retailers, official promotional offers, and verified B2B catalog integrations. Lowest fraud risk. Strongest buyer protection.
MethodologyPage.yellowBody: Reputable secondary marketplaces with buyer protection. Higher discount potential, but also higher risk of region-incompatible or invalid codes. We apply enhanced scoring.
MethodologyPage.redBody: Account resale, credential-linked products, and sources without meaningful buyer protection are excluded from iGift entirely. We do not list them.
MethodologyPage.effectivePriceDesc: The "effective price" shown on every deal includes all known costs:
MethodologyPage.priceEffectiveResult: Effective price, converted to your currency
MethodologyPage.affiliateDisclosureBody: iGift earns affiliate commissions when you click through to a seller and make a purchase. This does not affect our scoring or ranking — deals are ranked purely by their computed deal quality and confidence scores. Sponsored placements, if any, are always clearly labeled.

AlertsPage.heading: Price Alerts
AlertsPage.description: Get notified when verified deals drop to your target price. Only deals that pass our trust and verification checks.
AlertsPage.alertCancelledSub: You won't receive any more notifications for this alert.
AlertsPage.alertNotFound: Alert not found — it may have already been cancelled.
AlertsPage.instantAlertsBody: Email notification within minutes of a verified price drop.
AlertsPage.trustFilteredBody: Only Green and Yellow zone deals. No unverified sources.
AlertsPage.noSpamBody: Alerts only when your criteria are met. Unsubscribe anytime.
AlertsPage.freeTierNote: Free tier includes up to 5 active alerts · 24-hour delivery cooldown between repeat notifications

TermsPage.heading: Terms of Service
TermsPage.section1Body: iGift ("we," "us," "our") operates a deal discovery, verification, and ranking platform for digital value products including gift cards, digital credits, and vouchers. We are a publisher and referral platform. We do not sell gift cards, hold funds, process payments, or act as a marketplace or escrow service.
TermsPage.section2Body: Deals listed on iGift are sourced from third-party sellers, marketplaces, and authorized retailers. We verify deal data to the best of our ability using our scoring methodology, but we do not guarantee the accuracy, availability, validity, or usability of any deal, gift card code, or digital credit listed on our platform. Prices, availability, and terms may change without notice at the original seller's discretion.
TermsPage.section3Body: iGift earns affiliate commissions when you click through to a third-party seller and make a purchase. These affiliate relationships do not affect our deal scoring or ranking algorithms. Deals are ranked by computed Deal Quality and Confidence scores. Any sponsored or promoted placements are clearly labeled as such.
TermsPage.section4Body: You are responsible for verifying that any deal you pursue is compatible with your region, account, and intended use. You are responsible for understanding the terms, refund policies, and restrictions of the third-party seller before completing a purchase. iGift is not a party to any transaction between you and a third-party seller.
TermsPage.section5Body: Our Green, Yellow, and Red trust zone classifications are operator-level assessments based on source authorization, buyer protection, and fraud signals. They are not guarantees. A "Green" classification means we believe the source is authorized and reputable, not that every individual listing is free of error or risk.
TermsPage.section6Body: Price alerts are provided as a convenience. We do not guarantee delivery timing, accuracy of alert triggers, or continued availability of any deal referenced in an alert. Free tier alerts are limited to 3 active alerts per email address.
TermsPage.section7Body: You may not use iGift to:
TermsPage.section7Item1: Scrape, crawl, or systematically extract data from our platform
TermsPage.section7Item2: Resell or redistribute our deal data or scores
TermsPage.section7Item3: Submit fraudulent deal reports or abuse our reporting system
TermsPage.section7Item4: Circumvent rate limits or abuse our API (when available)
TermsPage.section7Item5: Use our platform to facilitate fraud, money laundering, or any illegal activity
TermsPage.section8Body: iGift is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any losses, damages, or disputes arising from your use of our platform or your transactions with third-party sellers. Our maximum liability is limited to the amount you have paid us directly (if any) in the 12 months preceding the claim.
TermsPage.section9Body: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of iGift after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
TermsPage.section10Body: Questions about these terms? Contact us at

PrivacyPage.heading: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.section1Item1Text: only if you sign up for price alerts
PrivacyPage.section1Item2Text: brands, categories, regions, and target prices you configure
PrivacyPage.section1Item3Text: anonymous page views, click patterns, and feature usage (via PostHog or similar)
PrivacyPage.section1Item4Text: standard HTTP headers for analytics and security
PrivacyPage.section2Item1: Gift card codes, redemption codes, or credentials
PrivacyPage.section2Item2: Payment information (we do not process payments)
PrivacyPage.section2Item4: Personal financial information beyond what you voluntarily provide
PrivacyPage.section3Item1: To deliver price alerts you have configured
PrivacyPage.section3Item2: To improve our deal verification and ranking algorithms
PrivacyPage.section3Item3: To understand usage patterns and improve the product
PrivacyPage.section3Item4: To prevent abuse and maintain platform security
PrivacyPage.section3Body: We do not sell your personal data to third parties. We do not share your email address with advertisers or deal sources.
PrivacyPage.section4Body: We use essential cookies for site functionality and analytics cookies to understand usage patterns. We do not use advertising tracking cookies. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.
PrivacyPage.section5Body: iGift contains affiliate links to third-party sellers. When you click these links, you are subject to the privacy policies of those third-party sites. We are not responsible for their data practices.
PrivacyPage.section6Body: Alert preferences are retained as long as your alerts are active. You can delete your alerts and associated email at any time by using the unsubscribe link in any alert email. Analytics data is retained in aggregate form and is not linked to individual users after 90 days.
PrivacyPage.section7Item1: Request a copy of any personal data we hold about you
PrivacyPage.section7Item2: Request deletion of your personal data
PrivacyPage.section7Item4: Unsubscribe from alerts at any time
PrivacyPage.section8Body: We use industry-standard security measures including HTTPS encryption, secure hosting, and access controls. We never store gift card codes or payment credentials.
PrivacyPage.section9Body: We may update this policy. We will notify alert subscribers of material changes via email.

DisclosurePage.heading: Affiliate Disclosure
DisclosurePage.shortVersionBody: iGift earns money when you click through to a seller and buy something. This never affects how deals are scored or ranked. Sponsored placements are always labeled.
DisclosurePage.revenueIntro: iGift is a free deal discovery platform. We earn revenue through:
DisclosurePage.revenueItem1Text: When you click a "View Deal" link and make a purchase at a third-party seller, we may earn a commission from that seller. This costs you nothing extra.
DisclosurePage.revenueItem2Text: (planned) — Enhanced alerts and pro features for power users.
DisclosurePage.revenueItem3Text: (planned) — Clearly labeled promotional positions. These will never be mixed with organic rankings.
DisclosurePage.notAffectItem1Text: are computed algorithmically based on effective price, historical context, region fit, and source trust — not affiliate revenue potential
DisclosurePage.notAffectItem2Text: reflect data quality and verification strength — not commercial relationships
DisclosurePage.notAffectItem3Text: (Green/Yellow/Red) are based on source authorization and buyer protection — not whether we have an affiliate relationship
DisclosurePage.notAffectItem4Text: is determined by the final composite score — affiliate relationships do not boost or demote deals
DisclosurePage.identifyBody: Every outbound link on iGift that leads to a third-party seller may be an affiliate link. These links are marked with the <icon/> icon and open in a new tab. The link URL may contain tracking parameters that identify iGift as the referral source.
DisclosurePage.commitmentBody: We believe that transparency about our business model is essential to the trust we ask you to place in our deal verification. If our scoring ever fails to match reality, it undermines our entire value proposition — not just our credibility but our revenue. Our commercial incentive is alignment: the better our recommendations, the more you trust and use iGift, the more affiliate revenue we earn. We have no incentive to mislead.
DisclosurePage.questionsBody: Contact <email>hello@igift.app</email> with any questions about our affiliate relationships or scoring methodology.

DevelopersPage.heading: iGift Deal Intelligence API
DevelopersPage.description: Access live trust-scored gift card deals, brand data, and pricing analytics programmatically. REST · JSON · Read-only.
DevelopersPage.featureTrustScoredBody: Every deal carries a Deal Quality Score (0–100) and Confidence Score. Green zone = verified sellers only.
DevelopersPage.featureLiveDataBody: Deals refreshed from source adapters every 6 hours. isHistoricalLow flag when price hits an all-time low.
DevelopersPage.featureMultiRegionBody: Filter by region (US, GB, CA, AU, …). countryRedeemable array on every offer.
DevelopersPage.authDescription: Pass your API key in every request via the {xApiKeyHeader} header (or {authBearerHeader}).
DevelopersPage.authNote1: Keys are prefixed {prefix} followed by 64 hex characters
DevelopersPage.authNote2: Keys are shown once at creation — store them securely
DevelopersPage.authNote3: Rate limit headers are returned on every response: {limitHeader}, {remainingHeader}, {resetHeader}
DevelopersPage.endpointDeals: List active deals, sorted by deal score
DevelopersPage.endpointBrands: List all active brands with offer counts
DevelopersPage.endpointBrandSlug: Single brand with all its current active offers
DevelopersPage.endpointStats: Platform statistics: total active deals, brands, historical lows, by-category breakdown
DevelopersPage.plansDescription: All plans are read-only. We never expose affiliate URLs via the API — visit <link>igift.app/deals</link> for click-outs.
DevelopersPage.ctaDescription: Email us with your use case and we'll issue a key within 24 hours.

Metadata.description: Discover, verify, and compare the best deals on gift cards, digital credits, and vouchers. Trust-scored, region-aware, fee-transparent.
Metadata.ogDescription: Trust-scored deal intelligence for gift cards, digital credits, and vouchers.
